name: Pimple Pop Rush
description: Do you have trouble with pimples? Come and join Pimple Pop Rush to enjoy squeezing pimples! As a beauty doctor, your task is to help each customer with skin cleaning and beauty treatment. The operation is simple, swipe to control your palm and remove all the pimples! Make every customer happy!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, run, running
